  "findings": [
    "Missing chairs and supports causing the rebar mat to rest directly on the dirt/subgrade."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop any scheduled concrete pours immediately.",
    "Lift the rebar mat and install approved chairs, bolsters, or concrete blocks (dobies) to achieve the specified concrete cover.",
    "Re-inspect the rebar clearance and spacing prior to pouring."
  ],
  "rationale": "The rebar mat is resting directly on the dirt due to missing supports. This violates concrete cover requirements, which will lead to rapid corrosion of the reinforcement and structural failure if concrete is poured. The work is roughly 70% complete but cannot be accepted until proper supports are installed.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 318 Section 20.6.1 (Concrete Cover Requirements)",
    "ACI 117 (Tolerances for Concrete Construction and Materials)",
    "Project Placing Drawings"
  ]
}
